I set it based on what I read about them and it's pretty working great for me. I mean Helot isn't dying pretty quickly like she used to.... I sent you that so you could maybe tell me what to adjust or maybe if I by chance get a new hero who to substitute for who
If that's Arc 1 story setup, then eh....
Get Caecus out and place Aigis
Wheels are quite a mess
I do not know why you want to run both caec and gelot in there
One sec, will help with adjusting

1. Remove Caecus, place Aigis
2. Equip Emerge, Frenzy, Gluttony on your supports. Whisper is optional, though considering there's Thais, I don't think you will have any Aliemus problems. All those wheels are Brown (R)
3. Give GHelot Hand of Oblivion instead of Friend, give Friend to one of your supports.
4. Thais is a Keyflare/Aliemus awakener and she wants to have the wheels connected to it, Karen's wheel is useless on her. I'm not sure about your wheels options, so yeah...can't recommend anything specific. Merciful Nurturing (her wheel) + Elevated Posse (SR) is the best option (Gateway of Truth from Tawil event is also very good). Winkle's wheel (Incalculable Factor) works as well until you get Thais's wheel.
Thank you so much
Like this?
Hey I just started playing the game a few days ago and does Celeste fit anywhere?? I kind of just kept getting her and I dont wanna put her to waste

Oh okay tysm

1. Give Uteri Somnia and Frenzy to Aigis
2. Remove Greed, I didn't mention this wheel <:dead:1356082627509092372> 
3. Give Frenzy to Thais
4. Give Emerge to Faint
As soon as you get Thais's wheel or Incalculable Factor, give it to Thais

Within covenants:
1. Thais wants Re-Evolution (D-Jewel shop covenant)
2. Aigis wants Life Drain (Chapter 7 covenant)
3. GHelot wants April Tribute (Chapter 8 covenant). In some places it's named April Praise.
4. Faint wants Burial Grounds (Chapter 4 covenant)

or

First variant is more defensive, second variant is more offensive

does Thais need E3?
Works at E0, wants E2. E3 is alright, but not worth the hussle over DPS awakeners.
As far as my understanding goes, with corrosion you detonate 300% of the damage you dealt iirc, so it's a covenant/investment issue. The harder your Jenkins hits, the more stack she'll detonate.
Here's Lens's explanation regarding corrosion stacks
So like inhibitus said earlier, it's investment issue.
Think of “Corrosion” as a “Debuff” on the enemy. The harder the initial hit, the more damage you deal due to the “Debuff”(Hence removing more Corrosion Stacks).
Ik that. It’s me playing ienkin that’s the problem.

you also have some set-up required.

1. Rouse Castor early in battle
2. Play Jenkin X card
3. Exalt Jenkin (get crit damage buff)
4. Play Castor Plumes (castor always crits after rouse and he will always apply corrosion with all plumes after rouse)
5. Annihilation - play inspo (get Jenkin swarm card, but if Castor has sig wheel, now all Jenkin Cards do more damage)
6. Play jenkin get 'em brown from exalt (each get em brown played in the battle increases the damage of swarm)
7.  Play swarm
Do I have to maximise arith usage for Jenkin x card?

not necessarily. Helps, but more important is playing a lot of get em brown before swarm. 

This is also something her portrait relic helps to buff too.

so you'll have smaller nuke turns, you have to rely more on annihilation

one last question though, whats the best way to play around/use thais gimmick

Emerge - after a battle you can not select a orision and instead increase you max hp% two times (always do this)
Frenzy - Allows you to buy Cursed relics in the shop and get some money back after purchasing them (Most cursed relics are very strong)
Emerge - you get an extra refresh in the shop and all of them are free (use it to get better cursed relics)
Use frenzy on thais for the keyflare main stat, and the two other on caecus
Also use the sr "to my dearest friend on corpo" and try to get more covenents

Thanks, I kinda own Thais wheel, Aigis and Faint.... Only Ghelot remain, where can I get it or can I use the normal Helot wheel for Ghelot?

Thais exlat let's you copy a command card two times and depending on your dupe lvl, lowers their cost (they will only last one round)
Copy gmruphy's 3 cost and use them on your burst turn
Her first command card lets you charge ur units exlat and for herself 
Her 2nd command card gives you embryo charge and a option between weakness or vuln both for 2 turns or also more embryo charge ( make sure to have vuln on your burst turn)
Her rouse is very strong, makes your fetus stronger, use it on units for more recharge (you get them more every time you posse and have a fetus in ur hand)
With caro units, devoring them gets you 2x devor effect

Hi everyone, new player here from czn and have a few questions regarding where and when to spend my pulls. Im about 5 days in and really enjoying the game, and want to optimize my account for endgame as a f2p. 

1. Who should I get for my limited selector? I know the meta pick is just get e0 castor but I'm not interested in building an ultra team, and if possible I would like a different e0 unit that I can invest in that can carry their team. Altho I will capitulate to getting him if he is that much stronger for my account lol. Who I'm thinking of right now is corposant for a discard team (and also because I like her design the most), although I'm not sure if the team scales well in endgame.

2. What realm should I be spending for standard pulls? For context, I'm spending all my silver and limited pulls trying to get e3 Gmurphy first, and then e2 thais and her wheel afterwards, which should be doable with all the pulls I get as a new player. Right now I'm just switching constantly between aequor (I want caecus dupes and hopefully a murphy) and chaos (Tawil dupes or any of the limiteds I don't have), but should I hyperfocusing on one realm only?

3. When is the optimal time to go to wheel jail? I'm not really looking forward to this because my goal is that after I get a good core for both aequor and chaos I want to pull on caro to hopefully get a team going with thais, although will this potentially brick my account?
I will definitely give them a shot and yeah, I'm not in a rush to pick any one right this second so I welcome opinions and advice and different teams to try out

honestly with those 4 you should be able to clear 👍 im new too but I've been asking and researching a lot so feel free to ask me if no one is answering but I always got help
